objective: Assess risks in Stage B v1 no-call/read_file exposure-geometry mapping and define controls.

risk_matrix.evidence: Observed in i10r_nocall_probe and i10r_residual_nocall_probe despite no-call restoration.
mitigations: Treat read_file metrics as dependent variables during sweep with catastrophic floors.
Pair no-call pressure with valid rg_search contrastive exposure 1:1.
Include high counterweight cells in smallest sweep (L/H, M/H, H/H).

risk_matrix.evidence: Current trainer lacks weighted-sampler and realized exposure telemetry.
mitigations: Implement exposure ledger before new runs if feasible.
Emit declared vs realized exposure by axis/family.
Attach cell_id and weighting mode in every run artifact.

risk_matrix.evidence: Duplication can inflate lexical concentration and distort gradient budget.
mitigations: Use duplication only as temporary approximation.
Maintain matched contrastive pair duplication symmetry.

risk_matrix.evidence: Prior package with uncertainty rows coincided with commitment collapse patterns.
mitigations: Default uncertainty conditioning exposure to zero.
Require explicit justification and separate flag for any non-zero inclusion.

risk_matrix.evidence: Single-point gains can be non-robust under calibration bifurcation regimes.
mitigations: Require repeatability across repeated seed or neighboring cell.
Use tolerance-based stability criterion before declaring frontier.

risk_matrix.evidence: Invalid JSON and payload_not_parsed shifts observed across probes.
mitigations: Track direct-answer substitution and payload_not_parsed jointly per cell.

sampler_loss_weighting_recommendation.rationale: Sampler weighting improves attribution with lower interpretability risk than loss weighting.
